horoscope: The Moon spends the day in your solar ninth house, dear Aries, and you're more forward-looking, outgoing, or adventurous. Even so, with a Mercury-Pluto minor challenge this morning, a serious or cautious vibe is likely, and you may be seeing problem areas more than you're seeing what's working. Mind you, this focus can be helpful if you use it constructively. If not, you may be dwelling or probing too much for your own good. Consider that words can be twisted around, and people more readily read negativity into situations due to fear or worry with this transit in play. Going too far with questions and probes may be part of the problem and is probably best avoided for now. Otherwise, especially as the day advances, a forgiving, comfortable energy supports speaking with less guardedness. You might decide to talk through a problem or dilemma, and helping someone may end up helping you. You're seeking ways to heal and improve. There is radiant energy with you for charitable, supportive relationships. In fact, you take pleasure in putting your faith in others or giving someone the benefit of the doubt.

The Moon spends the day in your intimacy zone, dear Taurus, signaling an introspective focus. It can be a time when you're more inclined to wait and see than to jump into action. Early today, a Mercury-Pluto minor challenge can darken the mood a touch, as the tendency is to see the negative potentials of a situation or second-guess people around us. Be kind to yourself and avoid negative thoughts beyond healthy skepticism now. Heavier than usual conversations may happen and should probably be navigated with more care than usual. Otherwise, especially as the day advances, it's a strong time for rising above tension. You can gain an edge in your career, move into a stronger position, or develop a more robust plan to achieve your goals. Being generous and charitable with others and offering your services freely can be a key to this.

The Moon spends all day in your partnership sector, dear Gemini, and you may seek out some feedback or company. Still, some frustrations may surface, seeking airtime early today, with Mercury in Pluto in a minor challenging aspect. If someone or a situation makes you feel claustrophobic, it may very well be a sign that you've been ignoring a problem that deserves some airtime. However, it's better to avoid stirring up controversy with a combative or mistrusting communication style, which can put others on the defensive. Instead, you might focus on doing some heavy digging on a more impersonal matter. Fortunately, as the day advances, it's easy to pull out of this mindset. In fact, satisfaction comes from helping others out with information or advice. As well, there is a gentle ease or flow between you and friends, co-workers, and associates. Tolerance, charity, and generosity are themes in your social life now.

The Moon spends the day in your work and health sector, dear Cancer, and taking care of business and pressing matters is a focus. There is a tendency toward mistrust early today, and while a bit of skepticism can be healthy and helpful, a Mercury-Pluto aspect in effect can push it a little too far, as it tends to exaggerate the negative. Try not to stress over differing perceptions of how you feel things should be, as people are wrapped up in their own issues right now. Think hard on a matter only if the process excites you and serves you well--and if you know your limits! Still, this energy is good for strategy. It’s also a good time to develop your talents, work on a money-making venture, or put effort into finding something lost or hidden. Business, career, and reputation get a boost today, and the key is to extend your help, services, advice, or expertise to someone in need.

Early today, whatever you're doing now, you tend to dig a little deeper, dear Leo. Answers that seem too easy or on the surface of things are unsatisfying, and it's important not to go too far with this! Watch for a tendency to dwell on or harp on problem areas and negative alternatives. You have better things to do! Your energy can be used elsewhere for projects that require added passion, and fortunately, as the day advances it's much easier to rise above these things. In fact, you can be in a strong position to team up with or otherwise cooperate with others to get things done. Giving a partner or friend the benefit of the doubt or a pass for something you might normally let slide can be in focus and can enhance your bond and make you feel quite proud of yourself, to boot. While there may be some differences in your visions of where you’re heading or your long-term goals, there can be great understanding and tolerance now, and this carries you forward.

The Moon spends all day in your home and family sector, dear Virgo, and there's a strong emotional focus on personal matters. You're less concerned with worldly goals than usual, and you may find yourself in need of more security or a sense of familiarity and safety. Early today, watch for power games and people who are playing them now with Mercury in a minor challenging aspect to Pluto. Try your best not to absorb the stress and tension of the people around you, and instead find something you love doing and direct energy into it. Fortunately, as the day advances, there is a sweet air of acceptance and understanding around you, and you might thoroughly enjoy providing a service or devoting some time to helping others now.

Mixing up the routine can help keep you stimulated today, dear Libra, with the Moon in your busy solar third house. You can be craving some variety and mental engagement. While this transit is rather light-hearted, early today holds some circumspect energy. Aim to avoid becoming too preoccupied with finding answers to problems, but focus your energy on making headway on the things that matter. You're interested in work that engages not only your mind but your heart as well, and this is a time for adjusting your approach to getting what you want by adding some strategy to the mix. As the day advances, it's especially easier to lighten up. Connecting with others and making a concerted effort to understand where they are coming from can be satisfying now. You feel good about yourself when you put your faith in people you care about.

The Moon spends today in your resources sector, dear Scorpio, and a quiet day would be ideal for you as emotions settle and you seek a predictable pace. Early today, however, a Mercury-Pluto minor challenging aspect can point to a tendency to go too far with a line of thinking, driven by fear or worry, and marked by mistrust. You are less likely to ignore problem areas under this influence, which can be useful to a degree, but know when you might take this a little too far for your own good. As the day advances, it's easy to rise above problems, and you might enjoy helping someone out or simply expressing your faith in them. Work might benefit from offering something freely and gaining the trust of others in the process.

The Moon spends another day in your sign, dear Sagittarius, animating your emotions. While this is typically a lighthearted transit, words expressed a certain way can lead to disagreements early today, so some tact is in order. Aim to clear these up and work on resolving problem areas while avoiding overthinking or overextending yourself as you do. Sometimes, trying to fix things with more words can make matters worse, and this may be one of those times! As the day advances, energies turn around nicely. In fact, you’re in an excellent position to convey what you mean and communicate with impact. It’s a fine time for expressing your faith in someone, offering help, particularly through words of advice or information, and finding new things to love about someone.

The Moon spends another day in the sign just behind yours, dear Capricorn, and this transit points to a general need to decompress and take a break from competitive or demanding situations. Suspicion can dull the good vibes, and directing your energy into investigating impersonal matters may be better than focusing your analysis on intimate affairs and topics close to the heart temporarily. There may be a tendency for certain others to misunderstand some of the things you say early today, or perhaps for you to be probing too far. However, as the day advances, the motivation to improve and advance is with you, and this fuels you. You can accomplish far more than usual when you feel dedicated. There is excellent energy for forgiveness or acceptance in relationships, particularly with family. It’s easier to overlook minor problems and see the value of your connections overall.

The Moon spends another day in your solar sector of recreation, entertainment, romance, and creative pursuits, dear Aquarius, encouraging your spontaneous, expressive side. However, there are some intense vibes early today, with Mercury and Pluto in a minor but challenging aspect, and the tendency is to try to push for an answer that may not be the best approach. Otherwise, this is a fine time to take things apart so you can learn more thoroughly. As the day advances, energies turn around quite nicely. There is generosity in your manner that endears others to you. You are willing to put in extra effort or express your dedication to your relationships.

The Moon spends another day at the top of your solar chart, dear Pisces, putting you in a goal-oriented frame of mind. Early today, there is some tendency for mistrust to get the best of you as Mercury and Pluto forms a minor but challenging aspect. Healthy skepticism is one thing, as it often serves you well, but if fear or worry muddies the waters, you may make more of a situation than it warrants. Watch for anxiety, unnecessary worry, or micromanaging things to take control of situations that probably should be left alone for now. However, as the day advances, energies turn around nicely, and you can be particularly generous with others–and they with you. It’s a good time for concentration and dedication, which is a magical combination.
